title: Floral Designers
description: Design, cut, and arrange live, dried, or artificial flowers and foliage.

tasks.text: Confer with clients regarding price and type of arrangement desired and the date, time, and place of delivery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select flora and foliage for arrangements, working with numerous combinations to synthesize and develop new creations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Order and purchase flowers and supplies from wholesalers and growers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Deliver arrangements to customers, or oversee employees responsible for deliveries.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan arrangement according to client's requirements, using knowledge of design and properties of materials, or select appropriate standard design pattern.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Water plants, and cut, condition, and clean flowers and foliage for storage.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Trim material and arrange bouquets, wreaths, terrariums, and other items, using trimmers, shapers, wire, pins, floral tape, foam, and other materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform office and retail service duties, such as keeping financial records, serving customers, answering telephones, selling giftware items, and receiving payment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Unpack stock as it comes into the shop.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create and change in-store and window displays, designs, and looks to enhance a shop's image.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inform customers about the care, maintenance, and handling of various flowers and foliage, indoor plants, and other items.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform general cleaning duties in the store to ensure the shop is clean and tidy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Decorate, or supervise the decoration of, buildings, halls, churches, or other facilities for parties, weddings and other occasions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct classes or demonstrations, or train other workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
